text.title: Text-to-Speech — Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: voice agent with ElevenLabs Turbo + OpenAI tts-1 fallback + Redis hash cache.

example.title: tts-config.yaml for support voice agent
example.code: provider: elevenlabs model: eleven_turbo_v2 voice: id: rachel clone_consent: true # rachel is a stock ElevenLabs voice; consent not required streaming: true cache: enabled: true ttl_days: 30 backend: redis key_template: "tts:{voice}:{model}:{sha256(text)}" fallback: provider: openai model: tts-1 voice: alloy trigger: consecutive_5xx: 3 timeout_ms: 1500 use_case: voice-agent language: en-US
example.note: Demonstrates r1 (Turbo for real-time), r3 (cache enabled), r4 (streaming true), r5 (OpenAI fallback differs from primary). Stock voice does not require clone consent.
